name: KENNAMETAL INC
business: Kennametal operates in two reportable segments: Metal Cutting and Infrastructure. The company sells tooling solutions and infrastructure products to end markets including Aerospace & Defense, Energy, General Engineering, Transportation, and Earthworks.

exposures.sentence: Aerospace & Defense end market sales increased in EMEA and the Americas as a result of project timing and the execution of our growth initiatives.
Aerospace & Defense end market sales increased in EMEA and the Americas as a result of project timing and the execution of our growth initiatives.

Energy end market sales increased in Asia Pacific as a result of project timing, the effects of which were offset by declines in the Americas due to lower global oil and gas activities as rig counts decreased year-over-year and order timing.
Earthworks end market sales decreased in the Americas due to lower mining activity, including customer mine closures and competitive pressures.
Sales in the General Engineering end market decreased in the Americas and EMEA due to declines in industrial activity year-over-year.
Transportation end market sales decreased in EMEA due to the decline in vehicle production.
an incremental year-over-year benefit of approximately $13 million from an advanced manufacturing production credit under the Inflation Reduction Act within the Infrastructure segment

catalysts.sentence: In January 2025, we announced several actions to support the long-term competitiveness of the Company and to mitigate softer market conditions.

catalysts.event: Expected annualized run rate savings of approximately $35 million from restructuring actions
catalysts.sentence: We now expect total annualized run rate savings of approximately $35 million in connection with these actions, exceeding the original target of $15 million.

catalysts.event: Completion of facility closure in Greenfield, MA and consolidation in Barcelona, Spain
catalysts.sentence: The Company substantially completed the closure of a facility in Greenfield, MA and the consolidation of facilities in Barcelona, Spain during 2025 as a part of these actions.

catalysts.event: Planned capital expenditures of approximately $90 million in fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: Cash generated from operations is expected to meet our planned capital expenditures of approximately $90 million and expected dividend payments in fiscal 2026.

catalysts.event: Share repurchase program authorized in February 2024
catalysts.sentence: In February 2024, the Board of Directors of the Company authorized a $200 million, three-year share repurchase program outside of the Company's dividend reinvestment program.
